templates.content:
{#seoPaginatorNormal page/}
{#seoPaginatorDocument page /}

<!-- Favicon -->
{#if site.data.containsKey('icon')}
{#let icon=site.data.getString('icon')}
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="{site.image(icon)}" type="{icon.mimeType}">
{/let}
{#else if site.data.containsKey('favicon')}
{#let icon=site.data.getString('favicon')}
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="{site.image(icon)}" type="{icon.mimeType}">
{/let}
{#else if site.imageExists('favicon.ico')}
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="{site.image('favicon.ico')}" sizes="any" type="image/x-icon">
{#else if site.imageExists('favicon.svg')}
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="{site.image('favicon.svg')}" sizes="any" type="image/svg+xml">
{#else if site.imageExists('favicon.png')}
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="{site.image('favicon.png')}" type="image/png">
{#else if site.imageExists('site-icon.svg')}
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="{site.image('site-icon.svg')}" type="image/svg+xml">
{/if}

{@java.lang.String script}
<script type="text/javascript" src="{script}"></script>

{@java.lang.String css}
<link rel="stylesheet" media="screen" href="{css}" />

<script type="importmap">
  {cdi:bundle.importMap.safe}
</script>

--- layout: roq-default/main asciidoc-attributes: notitle: true --- {@io.quarkiverse.roq.frontmatter.runtime.model.DocumentPage page} {#insert before-article /}
{#insert article-start /}
{#if page.image}
{/if}

{page.title}

{page.date.format('yyyy, MMM dd')}    
{#insert /}
Twitter Facebook Bluesky
{#for tag in page.data.tags.asStrings} {#let tagSlug = tag.slugify} # {tagSlug} {/for}
{#if page.data.author??} {#let author=cdi:authors.get(page.data.author)} {#if author}
{author.name} {author.job}
{/if} {/let} {/if}
{#insert article-end /}
{#insert after-article /}

{#include partials/roq-default/head.html /} {#insert head /}
{#insert /}

---
title: Oops! Roq is saying 404
layout: roq-default/default
bodyClass: page-not-found
link: 404.html
sitemap: false
search: false
---

{#insert content}
{#include partials/roq-default/404 /}
{/insert}

--- layout: roq-default/main paginate: true tagging: posts --- {@io.quarkiverse.roq.frontmatter.runtime.model.NormalPage page}

{page.data.tag}

{#for post in site.collections.get(page.data.tagCollection).paginated(page.paginator)}
{#if post.image} {/if}

{post.title}

{post.description}

{post.date.format('yyyy, MMM dd')}   —  {post.readTime} minute(s) read
{/for} {#include partials/roq-default/pagination.html/}
{#include fm/pagination.html} {#newer}{/newer} {#older}{/older} {/include}

{#if site.image}
{/if}
{site.data.name}
{#insert description}

{site.description}

{/}

{roq_theme:contact_title}

    {#for entry in brand.entrySet()} {#if site.data.get(entry.key)??}
    • {/if} {/for}
{now.format('Y')} © {site.data.simple-name}

{name}

{#if nested-content??}{nested-content}{/if}@{nickname}
{site.searchIndex}

<script type="module" src="{cdi:site.url.fromRoot('/static/bundle/search.js')}?id={config:["quarkus.uuid"]}"></script>
<script type="module">
  setupSearch({
    url: '{cdi:site.url.fromRoot('/search-index.json')}'
  });
</script>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{cdi:site.url.fromRoot('/static/bundle/search.css')}?id={config:["quarkus.uuid"]}">
